Description:
Required . The set of qualifications that explain and add depth to the events.
Note: This might not be present for some events

attributes.Description: Required. The unique ID (UUID) of this qualifier within Opta's entire database of all events and games. Example: 1967623354

Required - if the element is present. The ID for the type of qualifier - use in conjunction (cross-reference) with typeId values (event element), to get information about the event. See: Event Types and Qualifier Types

Optional. Value of the qualifier - if more than one value is available, the values will be returned in a comma-separated list. This could be a string of text (eg CT), boolean, or in the case of a player-related event/qualifier the "value" contains the alphanumeric related player UUIDs (if unknown, the value is 0 or null).
